title: jacea nemoralis subsp. debeauxii
intro: Jacea nemoralis subsp. debeauxii, also known as the Lesser Meadow Rue, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Apiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, as well as its potential to act as an anti-cancer agent and a natural anticoagulant. The herbal preparations of Jacea nemoralis subsp. debeauxii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
